mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_t (name, phone, grade, visit_count, memo, active) VALUES (#{username}, #{phone}, '일반', 0, '', 0)
INSERT INTO member_t (name, email, password, linked_customer) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{linkedCustomer})
mapper.select: SELECT m_idx, name AS username, email, password, reg_date AS regDate, active, linked_customer AS linkedCustomer FROM member_t WHERE email = #{email} AND active = 0

SELECT m.m_idx, m.name AS username, m.email, m.password, m.reg_date AS regDate, m.active, m.linked_customer AS linkedCustomer, COALESCE(c.phone, '' ) AS phone, COALESCE(c.grade, '일반') AS grade, COALESCE(c.visit_count, 0 ) AS visitCount FROM member_t m LEFT JOIN customer_t c ON m.linked_customer = c.c_idx AND c.active = 0 WHERE m.m_idx = #{m_idx} AND m.active = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_t WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_t WHERE name = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE member_t SET active = 1 WHERE m_idx = #{m_idx}
